canonical.title: Immersive experiences & hands-on workshops for two — Ghent 2026

parent.title: Date nights & weekend getaways for a Ghent couple — 2026 calendar

siblings.title: Live shows in 2026
siblings.summary: Confirmed May–December 2026 concerts, festivals, opera, musicals and weekend-getaway shows for a Ghent-based couple, with booking and dinner-pairing notes.

siblings.title: Seasonal festivals and cultural events
siblings.summary: Month-by-month picks for a Ghent-based couple — UNESCO carnivals, flower festivals, summer street fests, and winter markets within easy train reach.

siblings.title: Spectator sports for date nights
siblings.summary: The Six Days of Ghent is the local date-night classic; KAA Gent fills the autumn-spring slot; the spring cobbled classics give you a free outdoor day.

siblings.title: Spa, wellness, and themed-stay weekends in Belgium
siblings.summary: A Ghent-anchored shortlist of thermal day-trips, full spa-hotel weekends, and themed nature stays — picked by drive time, vibe, and price.

siblings.title: Train-reachable city breaks from Ghent (BE/NL/FR/DE/LUX)
siblings.summary: 20+ cities ranked by train time, vibe, and best 2026 event windows — only Lille is direct from Ghent internationally; everything else routes via Brussels-Midi.

siblings.title: Outdoor adventures for couples
siblings.summary: Day trips, weekend escapes, and big-ticket adventures for a Ghent-based couple, ordered by season for 2026.

sources.title: Ghent Chocolate Workshop
sources.claim: Ghent Chocolate Workshop offers a 2.5h pralines+mendiants class (€56) and 1.5h truffles class (€42) in English at Nodenaysteeg 5, 3 min from Korenmarkt.

sources.title: Chocolade Ambassade — Experience Chocolate
sources.claim: Chocolade Ambassade runs a 1h45m chocolate-making workshop at Kraanlei 3 in a 16th-century townhouse where you grind cacao and make your own bar.

sources.title: Onderbergen 4A chocolate workshop (TripAdvisor)
sources.claim: The Onderbergen 4A workshop pairs praline-making from scratch with a tasting of authentic Belgian beer.

sources.title: MIGLOT Private Perfume Workshop
sources.claim: MIGLOT's private 2.5h perfume workshop is capped at 2 participants and includes a 50ml Eau de Parfum in a leather travel-spray case with refills; €545 in the workshop catalogue.

sources.title: MIGLOT Workshops
sources.claim: MIGLOT also runs a non-private group perfume workshop priced at €195 per person.

sources.title: MIGLOT Fragrance Lab — Visit Gent
sources.claim: MIGLOT bills itself as the first Belgian perfume house and is listed by Visit Gent as a fragrance lab in the city centre.

sources.title: Gruut — Visit & Reservation
sources.claim: Gruut city brewery offers a 50-minute three-beer guided tasting at €15/person, minimum two people, must be reserved in advance.

sources.title: Filliers Distillery — Visits
sources.claim: Filliers Distillery in Deinze offers a 1.5–2 hour guided distillery tour with tasting; guides available in Dutch, French or English.

sources.title: Dok Brewing Company — Tours & Tastings
sources.claim: Dok Brewing Company runs an open Saturday 14:30 brewery tour, ages 16+, no Saturday-evening or Sunday tours.

sources.title: Suzy — Belgian cooking class (Traveling Spoon)
sources.claim: Suzy hosts an authentic Belgian cooking class in her Ghent home — couples cook a Flemish meal (e.g. stoverij, witloof) with the host.

sources.title: Private Handmade Pasta Workshop and Tasting in Ghent
sources.claim: A Private Handmade Pasta Workshop and Tasting in Ghent gives couples one-on-one training from two pasta experts using traditional Sicilian recipes.

sources.title: Industriemuseum Ghent
sources.claim: Ghent's Industriemuseum, in a former cotton mill near Vrijdagmarkt, runs printers' demos, a make-your-own minizine activity, and live spinning/weaving sessions.

sources.title: ARTCADE Brussels
sources.claim: ARTCADE in Brussels is a 60-minute immersive AR/360°-projection venue at Mont des Arts 5 with nine themed areas, suitable for all ages.

sources.title: Floraliën Ghent 2026
sources.claim: Floraliën Ghent 2026 runs 1–10 May 2026 across 10 days at Familie Van Rysselberghedreef 2 in Ghent's arts district.

sources.title: Lockdown Ghent (TripAdvisor)
sources.claim: Lockdown Ghent has 6 escape rooms with a 4.6 rating; Rum Rebellion uses a live actor.

sources.title: Escape rooms in Ghent (TripAdvisor)
sources.claim: Ghent has 10 escape-game venues offering 35 rooms total; top venues include Exit Games (4.8) and The Box (90 min, 7 rooms).

sources.title: Ambacht in Beeld Festival — Workshops & Masterclasses
sources.claim: Ambacht in Beeld Festival runs 9–10 May 2026 at Tour & Taxis Gare Maritime, Brussels — includes one-on-one glassblowing masterclasses (vase, carafe, glass).

sources.title: Bokrijk — Workshops
sources.claim: Bokrijk open-air museum in Genk runs six €5 hands-on workshops — clay pot, bread roll, leather bracelet, screen-printed bag, etc.

sources.title: Belgian Chocolate Workshop (Brussels/Bruges/Ghent)
sources.claim: Belgian Chocolate Workshop runs the same praline (2.5h, €56) and truffle (1.5h, €42) classes from three Flemish locations: Brussels, Bruges and Ghent.

sources.title: Bruges Beer Experience
sources.claim: Bruges Beer Experience is a museum+tasting (15cl × 3 beers included) covering Trappist beers, beer history and brewing.

sources.title: Bruges Waffles 'n Beer Workshop (Viator)
sources.claim: The Bruges Waffles 'n Beer Workshop combines a Belgian-waffle baking class with tasting of three Belgian beers — pitched at couples.

sources.title: Tomorrowland Belgium 2026 dates (DJ Mag)
sources.claim: Tomorrowland Belgium 2026 runs over two weekends in Boom: 17–19 July and 24–26 July 2026.

sources.title: GUM Botanical Garden during Floraliën
sources.claim: Floraliën-week ticket-holders can visit Ghent's GUM Botanical Garden for €6 in May 2026.

sources.title: GlazenHuis Lommel
sources.claim: GlazenHuis (Lommel) — Flanders' centre for contemporary glass art and glassblowing workshops — is closed for renovations until spring 2027.

sources.title: Bloemen Robberechts — Flower workshops 2026
sources.claim: Bloemen Robberechts runs scheduled flower-arranging workshops on 11 Mar, 1 Apr, 10 Jun 2026 — 2 hours, group max 12, materials worth €30 included.
